title: Iran's War Ends Today — If Iran Signs the Paper
script: Iran's war just ended? In February, the US and Israel struck Iran — killing the Supreme Leader — and Iran fought back by closing the Strait of Hormuz. That's 20% of the world's oil, cut off overnight. Prices spiked. Economies tightened. The world held its breath for 16 weeks. Then Pakistan stepped in to mediate. Both sides traded drafts. Yesterday Trump posted: the deal gets signed TODAY, and the moment it's done, the Hormuz Strait is open to all traffic. Iran's state media is still hedging. Saudi Arabia's celebrating. Pakistan's PM says it's hours away. This was the fastest oil crisis in modern history — closed to almost-peace in under 16 weeks. Could the Strait of Hormuz really reopen because Trump posted on Truth Social?
